notePlacement.method: Deterministic-still review at each annotation's mid-fade frame (fps=30): 2021-10 f5153, 2023-05 f6378, 2024-08 f7346, 2025-10 f8249, 2026-03 f8571. All 5 notes sit on the raised slate panel (rgba(24,31,43,0.96), distinct from the #07090c bg), in a chapter-empty band, over no other text.
notePlacement.fixApplied: Found one issue: the 2023-05 South End note, map-pinned to beat D4, occluded the 'Boston University' landmark label. Un-pinned it (dropped config beat:D4) so it renders in the proven-clean granular band; leaderboard highlights South End #1 at the same moment, so spatial context is kept. Re-rendered still f6378 confirms the label is fully legible and the note clears the timeline title.
notePlacement.note: Pass is on the current cut CONFIG verified via the deterministic renderer (Remotion frames == the pending final render). The exported mp4 predates this fix; re-render blocker retained in experiment/confidence.json.
